derivatives.glossEn: to officially control and manage a country, region, or organization
derivatives.exampleSentence: Elected officials govern the country on behalf of the people.

derivatives.glossEn: to draw something toward; to cause interest or appeal
derivatives.exampleSentence: Bright colors attract many tourists to the small coastal town.

derivatives.glossEn: having the quality of attracting; pleasing or appealing
derivatives.exampleSentence: The museum offers an attractive display of ancient pottery.
